name: player_pff_offense_ranked range year_offset averages the positional rank (not SUM)
description: offense_ranked is a positional-rank integer (verified on prod in [1,133], not a 0/1 flag), so a multi-year window must AVG like offense_rank, not SUM the ranks.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(pff_player_seasonlogs.offense_ranked) FROM pff_player_seasonlogs WHERE pff_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND pff_player_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025)) AS "pff_offense_ranked_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
